goals.title: Goals
goals.emptyDesc: Track what matters — Kernel checks in on your progress automatically.

errors.addFailed: Couldn't save that goal. Try again.
errors.updateFailed: Couldn't update that milestone. Try again.
errors.completeFailed: Couldn't mark that complete. Try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete that goal. Try again.

goals.deleteConfirm: Delete this goal? This cannot be undone.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.emptyDesc: Automate multi-step tasks — Kernel runs them exactly as you design.

errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save that workflow. Try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete that workflow. Try again.

workflows.deleteConfirm: Delete this workflow? This cannot be undone.

scheduled.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduled.emptyDesc: Set it and forget it — Kernel runs tasks on your schedule.

errors.createFailed: Couldn't schedule that task. Try again.
errors.updateFailed: Couldn't update that task. Try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Couldn't remove that task. Try again.

briefings.title: Briefings
briefings.generateTooltip: Generate a new briefing based on your interests and recent activity
briefings.emptyDesc: Get a personalized news and insights summary tailored to your interests and goals.
briefings.errorDesc: The research step didn't return enough data to create a useful summary. This can happen if the search service was temporarily unavailable.

errors.generateFailed: Couldn't generate your briefing. Try again.

stats.title: Your Stats
stats.loadError: Couldn't load your stats. Try refreshing.

kg.title: What Kernel Knows
kg.emptyHint: Keep chatting — it picks up on people, projects, and concepts you mention.

insights.title: Insights
insights.noBeliefsYet: No beliefs formed yet. Keep chatting — I'll learn what matters to you.
insights.noMemoryYet: No memory yet. I learn about you as we talk.
insights.noReflectionsYet: No reflections yet. I'll start tracking quality after a few conversations.

share.title: Share conversation
share.existingLink: This conversation already has a public link.
share.anyoneCanView: Anyone with this link can view this conversation.
share.createDesc: Create a public link anyone can view. No login required.
share.limitReached: You've reached your daily limit of {{limit}} shared links. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited sharing.

errors.createFailed: Couldn't create the share link. Try again.
errors.revokeFailed: Couldn't revoke that link. Try again.

mirror.title: The Mirror
mirror.emptyDesc: Keep talking — Kernel's agents are learning to see you from different angles.
mirror.convergenceDesc: Insights that only emerge when multiple agents compare notes.
mirror.facetsDesc: Each agent observes a different dimension of who you are.
